criteria.criterion: build_payload produces a code_review_result_v2 payload that pools blocking, advisory, dropped, and indeterminate, each finding retaining its verification, Pass-3 decision, and resolved block_threshold/blocking_enabled plus a norm_id. Oracle: a unit test driving build_payload with a verdict containing all four buckets and asserting on the payload JSON.

code_review_coach forwards dropped/indeterminate from the decide step into the terminal verdict dict. Oracle: a contract test calling the code_review_coach op with those inputs and asserting they appear in the returned verdict.
latest_code_review_result reads both a v1 and a v2 code-review sidecar. Oracle: a unit test with one hand-written record of each schema.
The novelty-floor surfaced-findings reader returns exactly the blocking + advisory union from a v2 payload, unchanged vs an equivalent v1 payload. Oracle: a unit test comparing the two.
make lint && make typecheck && make test pass.
